title: PLULON Round Plastic Tablecloth White Table Cover 84 inch Waterproof PEVA Tablecloth Bulk for Birthday Wedding Picnic Home Party Table Decorations
features: Package Include: 1 PCS white plastic tablecloth, the size of the table cloth is 84" /213 cm in diameter
Quality Material: The round table cover is made of peva plastic, and not easy to break, water and oil resistant

Easy to Clean: You can spread the plastic tablecloth on the table before the party, after the party you can wipe the tablecloth for recycling or roll up the messy tablecloth and throw it away to help you clean up the messy tabletop
The 84" white round tablecloth is ideal for wedding camping birthday home party anniversary outdoor or indoor events
The round tablecloths are the perfect way to decorate your round dining table. Note: The plastic tablecloth is folded, if you mind the crease, you can unfold and flatten it before the party
description: Product Description Round Plastic Tablecloth Plastic Tablecloth 84" /213 cm in diameter Our party table cover is made of PEVA, so the product is thin and may be a bit transparent, if you mind, you can choose a dark color tablecloth. The plastic party tablecloth is waterproof, oil-proof, spill-proof and easy to clean. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup.
